name: open-table-orchestrator
description: Root orchestrator for Open Table project

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend-admin && npm install --prefix frontend-customer && npm install --prefix frontend-pos
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "backend,admin,customer,pos" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend-admin" "npm run dev --prefix frontend-customer" "npm run dev --prefix frontend-pos"
